title: Famed UFO researcher dies unexpectedly in US

title: UFO Author’s Rocky Mountain Tragedy Stuns Nederland
description: David Wilcock, 53, a bestselling paranormal author and YouTuber, died after a reported mental‐health crisis near Nederland, Colorado. Officials released a timeline.

description: A chilling minute-by-minute police account has exposed the final minutes leading up to the death of a well-known UFO researcher amid intense public attention.
